Bibek Shrestha
Full Stack Developer
Kathmandu, Nepal | +977 9761764781 | bibekshrestha378@gmail.com | Portfolio | GitHub | LinkedIn
Summary

Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building production-ready web applications using the MERN stack. Proven ability to deliver complete systems — from database design and REST APIs to responsive React UIs and cloud deployment. Passionate about clean code, real-world integrations, and solving problems that matter.

Technical Skills
Frontend React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS
Auth & Security JWT, bcrypt, OAuth 2.0, OTP flows
Backend Node.js, Express.js, Python, REST APIs
Cloud & Tools Cloudinary, Render, Vercel, Git, GitHub
Database MongoDB, Mongoose, SQL basics
Integrations Khalti, Esewa, IMEPay, Socket.io, Groq AI
Projects
BookShelf — Online Book Buying & Rental Platform
MERN · Khalti · Socket.io · Groq AI
  • Built solo end-to-end — OTP email verification, Google OAuth, JWT auth, Khalti payment, COD, automated overdue fines via cron jobs, and Cloudinary media storage.
  • Real-time admin support chat (Socket.io) and AI book recommendation chatbot using Groq's Llama 3.3 70B model.
  • Full admin dashboard with live analytics, user/rental/order management. Deployed on Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas.
GreenBin — Waste Management System
MERN · Esewa · Khalti · IMEPay · JWT
  • Full-stack platform for scheduling waste pickups and managing subscription plans with multi-gateway payments (Esewa, Khalti, IMEPay).
  • Admin dashboard for managing pickup requests, monitoring collection routes, and tracking waste statistics in real time.
Weather Forecast App
HTML · CSS · JavaScript · PHP · OpenWeather API
  • Real-time weather app showing temperature, humidity, wind speed, and a 7-day forecast for any city worldwide with dynamic weather icons.

Key Strengths

Comfortable across the full stack — MongoDB schemas, Express APIs, React UIs, and cloud deployment. Strong track record of integrating real payment gateways, third-party services, and AI APIs into production systems. Fast learner who ships clean, maintainable code and thrives working independently.
